case_title: INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ARNALDO RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE S.F.O. SHUTTLE BUS CO.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) S.F.O. SHUTTLE BUS CO; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OCT-02-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $186.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARNALDO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED SEP-23-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT S.F.O. SHUTTLE BUS CO.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-13-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOV-13-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT COMPLAINT/ ENTIRE ACTION. THIS DISMISSAL ENTERED ON 11/19/02 IS NUNC PRO TUNC TO 10/7/02. RESUBMITTED AFTER REJECT BECAUSE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL DUE TO CHECKING OF BOX B1 AND B5 TOGETHER.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-08-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAY-30-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARNALDO

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARNALDO DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-23-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-26-2002
